frontMatter.title: Easy & Free HTTPS with Let's Encrypt
frontMatter.summary: HTTPS make the internet better and safer. It allows us to communicate securely in insecure channel such as public Wi-Fi or Internet Cafe.

prev.title: Lambda and SAM Conversion in Kotlin - Part 2
prev.summary: So we already create `Interface` in Java and convert it to lambda with in Kotlin through SAM conversion. How about `interface` in Kotlin? As the previous part suggest, currently there's no SAM conversion in Kotlin interface.

next.title: Disable Direct Access to Your IP in Nginx
next.summary: Often times we don't want to expose our server IP address to public. We just want to access our domain address.
